logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : START
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "START", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: p('mule.env'), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, sourceSystem: "P21", targetSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager" }]

logger.doc:name: LOG DEBUG: Parallel for each
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "Parllel for each process started", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, poMapping: payload }]

parallel-foreach.doc:name: Parallel For Each : Iteration over POs

logger.doc:name: Log DEBUG: APM Request
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "APM flow start", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p('mule.env'), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId }]

logger.doc:name: LOG DEBUG: APM Response
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "APM flow ended", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p('mule.env'), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, transmissionId: vars.transmissionId }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:BAD_REQUEST") (400) else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:NOT_FOUND") (404) else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED") (405) else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:NOT_ACCEPTABLE") (406) else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "APIKIT:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE") (415) else (500)

ee:transform.doc:name: Preparing error payload for transaction api

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : Error
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "Errored PO", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, poSummary: payload }]

logger.doc:name: LOG DEBUG: PO Status
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "Parllel for each process completed", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, poSummary: payload }]

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : Flag Updated
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var t = payload.TransactionSetResult.Results.Transactions.*Transaction--- { event: "Flag updation was Successful in P21", application: app.name, timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, successFlagPO: t filter ($.Status == "Passed") map $.DataElements.DataElement.Rows.Row.Edits.Edit.Value, }]

ee:transform.doc:name: Preparing Email Template for P21 connectivity issues, var : subject

logger.doc:name: Log INFO : Error
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "Connectivity Error in P21", error: error.errorType.identifier, flow: flow.name, application: app.name, timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId }]

ee:transform.doc:name: Prepare Error response for p21 flag updation issues, var : subject

logger.doc:name: Log INFO : Error
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "Flag Updation Error in P21", error: error.errorType.identifier, flow: flow.name, application: app.name, timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId }]

foreach.doc:name: For Each: Iteration Over Errored POs

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : END
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "END", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: p('mule.env'), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, sourceSystem: "P21", targetSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager" }]
